events.title: Johns Hopkins Game Showcase
events.food: Enjoy free pizza while playing student-made games

reviewsList.author: Alex M.
reviewsList.text: Pizza was amazing! Got there early, still plenty left

reviewsList.author: Jordan K.
reviewsList.text: Great games and the pizza was hot. Highly recommend!

reviewsList.author: Chris L.
reviewsList.text: Pastries were from local bakery, really good!
